title: fix: move digest label to the repository instead of tag
body:
When parsing the repository for [pull image](https://github.com/containers/podman-py/blob/main/podman/domain/images_manager.py#L376), the digest label is part of the tag and it sends a wrong repository. This is wrong and not accepted by podman which raises an error:
`APIError: 500 Server Error: Internal Server Error ({"message":"invalid reference format"}`

The digest label (algo) is before the `:` and is expected to the be in the repo, not in the tag. 

This PR includes:

- The fix in helper function, to returns the correct tuple
- Update test cases, they were defined invalid urls with digest. Also adds a new test case of a tag overrided by digest
- Another fix in registry_data, this is not part of the issue, I found it accidentally. It calls `parse_repository` and ignoring that it returns a tuple.

comments.body: [testing-farm:fedora-rawhide-x86_64:distro-fedora-all](https://github.com/containers/podman-py/pull/555/checks?check_run_id=44049691054) check is failing, but it does not seem related to my change. It seems some networking issue.
